## AI Is a Serious Risk

### Anthropic Dependency Risk

### Benjamin Mann

> "Once we get to superintelligence, it will be too late to align the models." Mann forecasts a 50th percentile chance of superintelligence by 2028 and estimates a 0-10% chance of existential risk or extremely bad outcomes from unaligned AI. The work of alignment has to happen before capability breakthroughs.

^[raw/transcripts/lenny/benjamin-mann.md]

### Brendan Foody

> Beyond just business opportunity, the evaluation ecosystem is critical for AI safety. Labs need rigorous, independent evaluation of model capabilities and risks. Mercor's marketplace provides the infrastructure for this, creating a competitive advantage through the breadth and depth of expert talent they can mobilize.
